name: Spiced Melon Cocktail
recipeIngredient: 1 Ripe honeydew melon, cut into seeded balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop melon into balls.
2. To make dressing, whip cream until soft peaks form. Mix in mayonnaise, lemon juice, paprika, hot pepper sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and tomato paste.
3. Stir crabmeat into the dressing. Lightly mix in the melon and toss gently until coated.
4. Arrange shredded radicchio on 4 individual serving dishes. Spoon melon and crab mixture onto radicchio.
5. Chill lightly. To serve, garnish with citrus slices and mint sprigs, if desired.
